overall.description: Game engine footage of a vast desert landscape with rolling orange sand dunes under a clear blue sky. The camera moves smoothly through the rippled terrain, briefly tilting upward to view the sky before continuing to explore the dune formations. On-screen UI indicates this is interactive footage with a 'Toggle FPS' option visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert sand sea with distant dune

agents.ego_description: moving steadily across the rippled sand toward a distant red dune on the horizon

entered.detail: large reddish sand dune formation visible on the horizon
wind-rippled orange sand covering the ground with wave-like patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast desert landscape under clear blue skies. The camera moves forward over rippled orange sand toward a prominent red dune visible in the distance. The terrain is empty with no vegetation or structures, emphasizing the openness of the desert environment.

events.description: camera tilts vertically upward from horizon to face directly into the sky

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to gaze at the clear blue sky and bright sun

entered.detail: bright sun glare visible at the edge of the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to face the clear blue sky, temporarily leaving the desert terrain out of view. The bright sun appears at the edge of the frame, creating a glare against the cloudless sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling dune field with large sand formations

events.description: camera tilts back down from sky to resume horizon-level view
large dark dune formation enters view from the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the desert while observing the changing dune formations and approaching larger sand hills

entered.detail: the distant dune reappears on the horizon as camera tilts down
wind-patterned sand returns to view as the camera faces forward
prominent dark-colored sand dune ridge that appears on the left and grows larger

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to horizon level and continues moving through the desert. The rippled sand terrain stretches ahead while new rolling dune formations appear in the distance. Around the 40-second mark, a large dark dune ridge enters from the left, becoming a prominent feature as the camera approaches and passes it, with the sun creating a warm glare on the left side of the frame.

[t=18s] clear_blue_sky(full)

=== Segment 2 [19.0s - 60.0s] ===
[t=20s] distant_red_dune(center_far), rippled_sand_terrain(center_near), rolling_dunes(right_far)
[t=30s] rolling_dunes(left_far), distant_dune_ridge(center_far), rippled_sand_terrain(center_near)
[t=40s] large_dark_dune(left_mid), rolling_dunes(center_far), rippled_sand_terrain(center_near)
[t=50s] large_dark_dune(left_far), sun_glare(left_far), rippled_sand_terrain(center_near)

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a vast desert that shifts from an open expanse of rippled sand to a more complex landscape of towering dune ridges. It begins by gliding over orange sand toward a distant red dune under a clear blue sky, emphasizing the emptiness of the terrain. As the camera tilts upward, the desert disappears from view to reveal a cloudless sky with the bright sun creating a sharp glare at the edge of the frame. The view then returns to the horizon, continuing its path through the rippled terrain as new rolling formations emerge in the distance. Finally, the scene shifts as a large dark dune ridge enters from the left and becomes the central focus, while a warm solar glare persists across the side of the frame.
